title: Cave Sounds+
description: Additional cave sounds by Cazsu, crafted to seamlessly fit with the vanilla sounds.
body:
# Ready for a scare?

This resource pack adds **20 new ambient cave sounds**, ranging from unnerving to genuinely frightening. 

Using the **same software that C418 used**, Absynth 5 and other Native Instruments plugins, I tried to keep these sounds as vanilla as possible _~~(except for two that are a little more evil)~~_ so they blend right in with the rest. They’re perfect for adding that little extra something to your next Minecraft horror mod playthrough.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/CBN8CiyrmX8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

I originally made these sounds for a personal modpack I put together for my friends and I, but I liked them so much I thought other people might enjoy them too, so I decided to share them on Modrinth!
